title: VENO 2 Pack Insulated Reusable Grocery Shopping Bag, Food Delivery, Cooler Bag, Heavy Duty, Large Size, Durable Handles, Dual Tab Zips, Lid, Stands Upright, Collapsible, Sustainable (Black, 2 Pack)
features: Reusable & Sustainable – VENO maximizes the use of post-consumer material to create high-quality, reusable, and sustainable grocery bags to create a cleaner, more livable future and save plastic from ending up in oceans, lakes, and landfills. Keep our bags in your kitchen or trunk for convenience to help protect our environment and create a better planet for us all.

Insulated Interior Keeps Food Fresh – Keep your food warm, cool, and always fresh with the triple-layer thermal insulation fabric technology for the utmost convenience. You don’t have to worry about your ice cream melting or your hot food getting colder on your drive home! Essential for frozen groceries, produce, cold drinks, and hot food items.

Store Plenty with Large Capacity – 40.1 W x 33 H x 22.1 D (cm). Fit a large amount of grocery items while you shop with the spacious nature and large capacity! No need to carry a ton of bags as one bag can replace multiple traditional plastic shopping bags. Carry multiple orders when delivering food or take plenty of food to picnics, gatherings, catering, beach days, tailgating, potlucks, or parties. Easily accommodates 35.2 L or 40 cans!

Heavy-Duty & Durable Structure – Carry large loads with the sturdy and strong construction which can easily support up to 20.4 kg! Easily carry the bag by the triple-layered, reinforced handles specifically designed to wrap around the bag for heavy loading. Keep your items safe and secure with the dual tab, smooth sliding, zippered lid. Made from a high-quality, hardwearing, non-woven fabric material that is built to last. Easily clean with a sanitizing wipe or damp cloth then let air dry.

Flexible & Collapsible for Easy Storage – Fit bulky and odd shaped items in the bag as the flexible fabric can accommodate all your necessary items. Collapse and fold flat for future use and easy compact storage in your kitchen, under your car seat, or in your trunk for quick retrieval!
description: Product Description Maintain the freshness of your food! VENO Insulated Shopping Bags for Groceries! Ensure your food stays fresh and cool with VENO Insulated Bags. Our triple-layer insulation technology keeps your items chilled from store to home, so you can trust your groceries will always be in top condition. Insulated Grocery Bags Merchant video Why Us? VENO BAGS Built to last, VENO bags are tear and water-resistant, with a triple-layered bottom for stability. The triple-layer insulation keeps your food warm or cool, maintaining freshness. Reusable and versatile, they’re perfect for various needs and designed for repeated use. OTHER BAGS Other bags are flimsy and tend to collapse, making loading difficult and providing little support for heavy items. Without insulation, food spoils, and frozen goods melt. Made from low-quality materials, they’re not water-resistant, easily damaged, and hard to clean. Perfect for Food Delivery! Secured During the Ride With a sturdy zip top lid and a well-structured design, our cooler bag ensures that your delivery is secure The reinforced zipper closure keeps the bag sealed tight, preventing items from shifting or falling out during transit. Perfect for Events and Gatherings Our cooler bag not only keeps your food delivery orders warm and ready to eat but also excels in transporting your culinary creations to picnics, potlucks, and parties. Accommodates multiple food containers and utensils, ensuring everything arrives at their destination at the perfect temperature. Stylish, Sustainable, and Versatile! Everyday Sustainability with Multi-Purpose Reusable Bags Perfect for Groceries, Work, College, Outdoor Activities, and Food Delivery. Versatile and sustainable, simplifying your life while aiding the environment.
